spec_match.rationale: Very nice timing breakdown, accurately representing how a single slow chunk triggers cascading delays for same-origin readers in sequential contexts.

interactive.rationale: Features tab selectors, an active timing runner, dynamic progress bar increments, and a detailed timeline dashboard updating blocked segment blocks.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfect alignment with the parent description of a 6-chunk timing simulator.

edge_cases.rationale: Appropriately schedules absolute performance timers to prevent race states and clears active intervals during resets.

references.rationale: The page lacks a 'see also' section and fails to cite the official ChromeStatus feature tracking link.

design_system.rationale: Adheres strictly to show-theme styling rules by selecting standard palette colors, placing nice legends, and applying proper shadows.

openQuestions.title: Cite the ChromeStatus entry link in references
openQuestions.detail: Add a see also section with the required external reference link to https://chromestatus.com/feature/5111042975465472 at the bottom of the page to satisfy showcase standards.
